objective: Implement the first bounded repository mutation for the post-authentication continuation corridor.
stop_condition: Stop immediately after MUT-001 validation. Do not begin a second mutation.

authorized_surface.name: Post-Authentication Continuation Corridor
authorized_surface.objective: Implement Runtime Identity Resolution across the certified continuation corridor while modifying only the minimum repository surfaces required to satisfy the acceptance criteria.

implementation_rule: Mutate the minimum number of eligible surfaces necessary. Each modified surface must be justified in the mutation evidence.
